source.cross_entropy_loss:
def cross_entropy_loss(z, targets, ctx=None):
    B = z.shape[0]
    z_max = z.max(dim=1, keepdim=True).values
    log_sum_exp = (z - z_max).exp().sum(dim=1).log() + z_max.squeeze(1)
    loss = (log_sum_exp - z[torch.arange(B), targets]).mean()
    if ctx is not None:
        ctx.append([cross_entropy_loss_backward, [loss, z, targets]])
    return loss
source.train_epoch:
def train_epoch(model, optimizer, loader):
    total_loss = 0
    n_batches = 0
    for images, labels in loader:
        x = images.view(images.size(0), -1)
        ctx = []
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        logits = model(x, ctx=ctx)
        loss = cross_entropy_loss(logits, labels, ctx=ctx)
        backward(loss, ctx)
        optimizer.step()
        total_loss += loss.item()
        n_batches += 1
    return total_loss / n_batches

source.cross_entropy_loss:
def cross_entropy_loss(z, targets, ctx=None):
    B = z.shape[0]
    z_max = z.max(dim=1, keepdim=True).values
    log_sum_exp = (z - z_max).exp().sum(dim=1).log() + z_max.squeeze(1)
    loss = (log_sum_exp - z[torch.arange(B), targets]).mean()
    if ctx is not None:
        ctx.append([cross_entropy_loss_backward, [loss, z, targets]])
    return loss
source.train_epoch:
def train_epoch(model, optimizer, loader):
    total_loss = 0
    n_batches = 0
    for images, labels in loader:
        x = images.view(images.size(0), -1)
        ctx = []
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        logits = model(x, ctx=ctx)
        loss = cross_entropy_loss(logits, labels, ctx=ctx)
        backward(loss, ctx)
        optimizer.step()
        total_loss += loss.item()
        n_batches += 1
    return total_loss / n_batches
